title: Complete grounded handbook from supplied synthetic text
instructions: Use the supplied parent brief and complete synthetic excerpt to create a compact but complete reading-adventure plan and child-facing handbook sample. Include one fully written adventure packet and show how remaining packets would follow the same system.

criteria.title: Full mode and coordinated outputs
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the response explicitly uses full depth and contains both an adult-facing plan and a child-facing handbook/sample packet.

criteria.title: Grounded content
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if all story-specific details come from the supplied synthetic text and the evidence level is declared as Level A.

criteria.title: Two-page packet
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if Page A contains invitation, reading entry, play start, bridge, and next choice; Page B is the creation/play surface; any Page C is explicitly optional.

criteria.title: Child agency and independence
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if core play leaves at least three meaningful choices open, includes a stop/switch option, and does not depend on adult grading or questioning.

criteria.title: Counts and safety
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if core labels and audit counts use the frozen denominator rules and materials/media have a safe private alternative.
